## Safety notice

Do not paste private playlist URLs, credentials, paid channel links, tokens, Xtream credentials, Stalker portal URLs, MAC portal identifiers, or DRM bypass details. Use redacted examples or `example.*` placeholders.

## Command

```bash
iptv-doctor check playlist.m3u --report report.html --json report.json
```

## Redacted sample

```m3u
#EXTM3U
#EXTINF:-1 tvg-id="example.channel",Example Channel
https://example.invalid/add-your-legal-stream
```
